introSection: Hollywood Dream: The Ride (Japanese: ハリウッド・ドリーム・ザ・ライド) is a Bolliger & Mabillard steel roller coaster at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Hollywood Dream: The Ride is a mini hyper coaster from B&M. Despite this, B&M class it as a Hyper Coaster model like their larger hyper coasters.

The coaster has a dual station.

The ride system has five "Dream Tracks", allowing riders to choose a song to listen to whilst they ride, similar to Hollywood Rip Ride Rockit at Universal Studios Florida. These songs change periodically, mainly for promotional events.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: As of March 15, 2013, riders could choose to ride a train that seats them backwards.

sections.title: Collaberation events
sections.content:
Much like other attractions at the park, Hollywood Dream: The Ride has seen temporary overlays to correspond with Universal's "Cool Japan" events and occasional tie-ins to movies.

Unlike Space Fantasy The Ride, these overlays only change one or two of the Dream Track selections.


 * One Piece Story Ride (1 July - 6 October 2025)
 * Spy × Family Story Ride (1 July - 4 January 2026)
 * "Detective Conan x Story Ride: Auto-Drive Gone Rogue (Universal Cool Japan 2026) (30 January - 30 June 2026)

fullText:
Hollywood Dream: The Ride (Japanese: ハリウッド・ドリーム・ザ・ライド) is a Bolliger & Mabillard steel roller coaster at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Japan.

Hollywood Dream: The Ride is a mini hyper coaster from B&M. Despite this, B&M class it as a Hyper Coaster model like their larger hyper coasters.

The coaster has a dual station.

The ride system has five "Dream Tracks", allowing riders to choose a song to listen to whilst they ride, similar to Hollywood Rip Ride Rockit at Universal Studios Florida. These songs change periodically, mainly for promotional events.

As of March 15, 2013, riders could choose to ride a train that seats them backwards.

Much like other attractions at the park, Hollywood Dream: The Ride has seen temporary overlays to correspond with Universal's "Cool Japan" events and occasional tie-ins to movies.

Unlike Space Fantasy The Ride, these overlays only change one or two of the Dream Track selections.


 * One Piece Story Ride (1 July - 6 October 2025)
 * Spy × Family Story Ride (1 July - 4 January 2026)
 * "Detective Conan x Story Ride: Auto-Drive Gone Rogue (Universal Cool Japan 2026) (30 January - 30 June 2026)
